creator: freebsd@pki2.com
text:
I received the following private mail regarding the recent changes to net-mgmt/cacti and posting it here for comment.

A knob would have to selectively patch several files. Cacti lacks a certain robustness -- paths ARE NOT set in one location, such as a header file.


On Mon, 2014-08-18 at 14:31 +0100, Chris wrote:
Hi
> 
>  
> 
> the rra path changes you please need to make optional on a KNOB or revert,you cannot just make major changes like that on a live port, the directory  structure has been like this for years, in addition rra files can get vary large and /var is not the ideal place to put them.
> 
>  
> 
> Regards
> 
>  
> 
> Chris
> 
> 
>
